executable_code.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv('input_file_0.csv')
df['capacity_mw'] = pd.to_numeric(df['capacity_mw'], errors='coerce')
df['commissioning_year'] = pd.to_numeric(df['commissioning_year'], errors='coerce')
df['latitude'] = pd.to_numeric(df['latitude'], errors='coerce')
df['longitude'] = pd.to_numeric(df['longitude'], errors='coerce')

hydro_plants = df[df['std_fuel'] == 'Hydro'][['std_name', 'capacity_mw']]
hydro_plants_sorted = hydro_plants.sort_values(by='capacity_mw', ascending=False)

# Optional: Round capacity_mw to 2 decimal places as per general instructions
hydro_plants_sorted['capacity_mw'] = hydro_plants_sorted['capacity_mw'].round(2)

result = hydro_plants_sorted.values.tolist()
print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
